ddls:
CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "netloc" TEXT /* Network location of the platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the platform */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the platform (e.g., Clients, Gigs) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the platform (e.g., Clients, Clients & Gigs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the platform was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the platform's headquarters */,
  "number_of_users" INTEGER /* Number of users registered on the platform */,
  "number_of_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of jobs posted on the platform */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform information was last updated */,
  "features" TEXT /* JSON column to store a list of features offered by the platform */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON column to store a list of tags for easy categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opinions" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the opinion belongs to */,
  "opinion_text" TEXT /* Text of the opinion */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to external resources related to the opinion */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date and time when the opinion was posted */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author who posted the opinion */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the opinion (e.g., blog, forum) */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the opinion is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opinions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliate_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliate link */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the affiliate link belongs to */,
  "link" TEXT /* Affiliate link */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the affiliate link was added */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the affiliate link (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the affiliate link has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliate_links_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening" (
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening information */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the screening information belongs to */,
  "screening_text" TEXT /* Text of the screening information */,
  "date_screened" TEXT /* Date and time when the screening information was last updated */,
  "screening_type" TEXT /* Type of screening process (e.g., background check, interview) */,
  "screening_criteria" TEXT /* JSON column to store the criteria for screening */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was posted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review is anonymous */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
